---
title: "Team"
page-layout: full
format: html
---

**An official collaboration between**

![](images/trelogoer.png)

<br>

**Steering Committee**

::: {.team-grid layout-ncol="5"}
![Susanne Axelsen, Chairperson of the Danish Choosing Wisely organisation](images/susanneaxelsen.png)

![Henrik Ømark Petersen, Chairperson of the Danish Society for Emergency Medicine](images/henrikomark.png)

![Ann Kathrine Ryberg Sindby, Chairperson of the Danish Neurotrauma Committee](images/annkathrine.png)

![Michael Braüner Schmidt, Chief Medical Officer, Aarhus University Hospital](images/michaelbraunerschmidt.png)

![](images/blank.png)

![Jørgen Frøkiær, Head of the Department of Clinical Medicine, Aarhus University](images/jørgenfrøkiær.png)

![Kasper Karmark Iversen, Professor, Dept. of Internal Medicine, Herlev Hospital](images/kasperkarmark.png)

![Ole Graumann, Head of Research, Dept. of Radiology, Aarhus University Hospital](images/ole.png)

![Rozh Al-Mashhadi, Principal Investigator, Dept. of Radiology, Aarhus University Hospital](images/rozh.png)

![](images/blank.png)
:::

**Local Investigators**

::: {.team-grid layout-ncol="5"}
![Nikolaj Raaber, Associate Professor, Emergency Department, Aarhus University Hospital](images/nikolajraaber.png)

![Kasper Karmark Iversen, Professor, Department of Internal Medicine, Herlev Hospital](images/kasperkarmark.png)

![Hanne Nygaard, Head of Research, Emergency Department, Bispebjerg and Frederiksberg Hospital](images/hanne.png)

![Michael Dan Arvig, Associate Professor, Emergency Department, Slagelse Hospital](images/michael.png)

![Ove Andersen, Head of Clinical Research, Amager and Hvidovre Hospital](images/ove.png)

![Anders Jody, Chief Consultant, Department of Orthopedic Surgery, Kolding Hospital](images/andersjody.png)

![Joakim Jensen, Consultant, Department of Orthopedic Surgery, Odense University Hospital](images/joakim.png)

![Christian Backer Mogensen, Professor, Emergency Department, Hospital Sønderjylland](images/christianbacker.png)

![Peter Biesenbach, Head of Research, Emergency Department, Esbjerg Hospital](images/peter.png)

![Anne Lund Krarup, Associate Professor, Emergency Department, Aalborg University Hospital](images/joakim.png)
:::

**Local Project Managers**

::: {.team-grid layout-ncol="5"}
![](images/blank.png)
:::

**Central Organizing Committee**

::: {.team-grid layout-ncol="5"}
![Julie Bjørn Bay, MD, PhD student, Aarhus University Radiology Research Unit (AURA), Aarhus University](images/julie.png)

![Stig Holm Ovesen, PhD, Aarhus University Radiology Research Unit (AURA), Aarhus University](images/stig.png)

![](images/blank.png)

![](images/blank.png)

![](images/blank.png)
:::
